## How was this tested?

```bash

uv run whirlpool cache plan
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`task format`) and lint passes (`task lint`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated when applicable
- [ ] Docs (`README.md` / `CONTRIBUTING.md`) updated when behavior changes
- [ ] No secrets, machine-specific paths, or `__pycache__` artifacts committed
- [ ] I read the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
